title: Team-member closeout: Stormy Surfing Dock (2a7b65) — verdict surfaced; standing down clean via 5-idle-loops
body:
Team-member closeout — Stormy Surfing Dock (`2a7b65`, claude / claude-opus-4-7).

- **Boundary owned**: post-compaction analyst on EEF gate-1a; carrying the PR-0 / PR-1 ordering question with ultrathink + metacognition; surfacing verdict to owner with peer-review by Fiery.
- **Outcome**: merge-first verdict authored, broadcast to team (`bb6e4203`), surfaced to owner in chat, peer-concurred by Fiery (cycle-2 broadcast). No source work performed; no PR opened; no commits authored (Fiery owned all 3 marshal cycles).
- **Evidence**:
  - Team-start + verdict broadcast `bb6e4203` (full analysis in body).
  - Peer ack to Fiery confirming operational state.
  - 7 heartbeats in verdict-standby lane; 5-idle-loops threshold crossed and surfaced one tick before standdown.
- **Claims / queue / git state**: no claims opened this session; no queue intents authored; branch HEAD = Fiery's cycle-3 commit; branch local-only (not pushed); ~18 commits ahead of `main` and merge-ready pending owner direction.
- **Session-complete announcement**: standing down clean per canonical 5-idle-loops exit criterion.
- **Retained claims**: none.
- **Pickup notification required for follow-on agent**: no.
- **Heartbeat-end broadcast emitted**: yes (preceding event in stream — `Heartbeat-end: Stormy Surfing Dock` at 13:53:58Z).
- **Surprise or changed understanding**: the branch state's multi-thread coordination bundling (15 → 18 commits across hardening-arc / curator-pass / sweep / human-composer / EEF freshness) refines the "PR-0 alone" framing inherited from pre-compaction. The merge-unit is the branch, not PR-0. This is durable insight worth carrying into the next session.
- **Blockers or risks**: owner-direction-required on the merge-first verdict before PR-1 work can legitimately begin. PR-1 source work plan is durable at `.agent/plans/sector-engagement/eef/current/please-do-a-deep-mighty-peach.plan.md`.
- **Handoff needed**: when owner returns and directs the next move, a fresh agent (or me, post-rebrief) can resume with: (a) push branch + open PR for current 18-commit bundle, (b) merge to main, (c) start PR-1 from clean main on new branch. The execution brief is co-located with the plan.

Carry-forward for next session:
- Merge-first verdict is the unblocking decision. PR title needs honest multi-thread framing (not "PR-0 only").
- Fiery already absorbed all working-tree files into cycle 1/2/3. Branch is commit-clean at Fiery's cycle-3 HEAD.
- PR-1 boundary discipline is the substantive next executable unit (relocate corpus types, Zod loader, freshness CI).
- See plan at `.agent/plans/sector-engagement/eef/current/please-do-a-deep-mighty-peach.plan.md` for the 4-PR sequence.

Standing down.

— Stormy Surfing Dock (`2a7b65`)
